style.styleSentence: A cinematic alternative-rock anthem with a tempo of 92.29 BPM, layered with gritty guitars, pounding drums, and atmospheric synths, capturing the raw energy of a post-party midnight scene filled with defiance and resilience.
style.vocalStyle: Aggressive, fast-paced, and emotionally charged with spoken word interludes

sections.text:
You can stop checking—
I'm still fucking here.

They threw stones, I returned a boulder
Tyler ain't the type to let a little scratch get mulled over
Pressure built, heat meant to burst—I just got colder
Weight of the world? It's me on my shoulders
Even on my shittiest day, these hands don't shake
You get what you give—I get what I take
Had a knife in my back, still ate off the same plate
Now I walk in like the building got my name on the gate
Bad hand dealt, I made the cards look loaded
Pain came back for what I owed—I told it, "Account closed"
Every scar got a story, I don't care who knows it
Turned a life full of cracks into armor—I molded it
They couldn't shatter my will, now they're chanting my name
Tyyyleeer!
No longer playing, now I'm coding the game
Built a throne from the wreckage, let 'em study the frame
They were betting on the break, now they're scared of the change

I was made to break
Every lock, every limit, every chain in my way
Made to break
Not bend, not fold, not fade
Put the pressure on me, watch the pressure obey
You can call me damaged—I call it battle-made
They were waiting on a body, I became the barricade
I was made to break
Everything but me

You call it trauma, I call it repetition
Pain kept talking, I stopped giving it permission
I don't need your pity, I need better opposition
They keep praying for the fall like it's some kind of religion
Life kept swinging till its knuckles split
I got bored of getting hit, made a joke out of it
Fear got old, pain went quiet, doubt lost its grip
Now the worst days see me coming and they call in sick
Every shot that they sent only sharpened my aim
I don't carry my damage—I make damage behave
Tried to bury me alive, I put a stage in the grave
Now the dirt on my name got 'em screaming my name
I don't wait on luck, I put a boot on fate
Every loss came heavy, I just added to the weight
They kept aiming for the cracks, trying to widen the breaks
Now the damage holds me up—motherfucker, I'm reinforced

I was made to break
Every lock, every limit, every chain in my way
Made to break
Not bend, not fold, not fade
Put the pressure on me, watch the pressure obey
You can call me damaged—I call it battle-made
They were waiting on a body, I became the barricade
I was made to break
Everything but me

Try to break me—I break back
Pile it on—I adapt
Turned the pain into a weapon
Turned the pressure into impact
No collapse, no retreat
I don't beg, I don't ask
I'm the product of the worst shit
And I came out built to last

sections.raw: Final Chorus — biggest delivery, layered vocals
